version.description: Policy schema version. Must be exactly "0.1" for this release.

aliases.description: Map of user-spoken names to deviceIds. Preferred way to resolve names reliably. May be null / commented-out block.

additionalProperties.description: A SwitchBot deviceId, as shown in `switchbot devices list --format=tsv`.

confirmations.description: Override default confirmation behaviour per action name. May be null / commented-out block.

always_confirm.description: Action names (e.g. "setTargetTemperature") that always need explicit user confirmation, even if their safetyTier would allow auto-run. May be null / commented-out list.

never_confirm.description: Action names that normally confirm but the user has pre-approved. MUST NOT contain destructive actions (lock, unlock, delete*, reset*) — the skill rejects that at load time. May be null / commented-out list.

quiet_hours.description: During this window every mutation requires confirmation. Times are local system time, 24-hour HH:MM. May be null / commented-out block.

log_path.description: Absolute or ~-prefixed path to the JSONL audit log.

retention.description: How long audit log lines are retained. "never" disables rotation; otherwise a duration like "90d", "4w", "6m".

automation.description: Reserved for the Phase 4 rule engine. Set `enabled: false` for now. May be null / commented-out block.

rules.description: Reserved. Will be typed in policy schema v0.2 when Phase 4 ships.

cache_ttl.description: Override the CLI's device-cache TTL, e.g. "5m", "30s".
